content.thinking:
Good! I can see the term UBERON:0022232. Looking at the stanza:

```
[Term]
id: UBERON:0022232
name: secondary visual cortex
xref: EMAPA:35758
xref: MA:0000915
is_a: UBERON:0035014 {source="cjm"} ! functional part of brain
relationship: capable_of_part_of GO:0007601 ! visual perception
relationship: overlaps UBERON:0006473 ! Brodmann (1909) area 18
relationship: part_of UBERON:0000411 {source="cjm"} ! visual cortex
relationship: part_of UBERON:0002021 {source="MA"} ! occipital lobe
```

Issues to fix:
1. No textual definition - need to add the definition suggested in the issue
2. Redundant 'part_of' some 'occipital lobe' axiom - this should be removed since there's already 'part_of' some 'visual cortex', and 'visual cortex' is 'part_of' some 'occipital lobe'

Let me verify that visual cortex is indeed part of occipital lobe:

content.text: Let me verify the relationship between visual cortex and occipital lobe to confirm the redundancy.

id: UBERON:0000411
name: visual cortex
def: "The part of the occipital lobe responsible for processing visual information." [Wikipedia:Visual_cortex]
comment: The visual cortex is made up of Brodmann area 17 (the primary visual cortex), and Brodmann area 18 and Brodmann area 19, the extrastriate cortical areas, in humans.
subset: efo_slim
synonym: "higher-order visual cortex" RELATED [FMA:242644]
synonym: "visual areas" RELATED [BAMS:VIS]
